title: EbonyLib
description: A Worldgen library for configured features and structures
body:
# What is EbonyLib?
EbonyLib is a library for Forge 1.20.1 that focuses on adding new ways to configure custom Features and Jigsaw structures!


# The features of this mod currently include:

-Jigsaw structure types that don't have the normal 7 levels/128 blocks from center limits

-Jigsaw structure types that can check for a solid block before placing

-Banded Ore features that can place large discs of blocks in layered bands

-Glow Lichen-like growths that place more than 2 blocks of that kind along any solid face

-And even new, highly customizable Trunk Placers for custom trees!



# Some examples of what's possible with this mod:

![Eldbrass Ore Bands](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1587/792/eldbrass-bands-png.png) ![Spreading Lumen Berries](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1587/793/spreading-growths-png.png) ![An Oldknot Tree with a Chandelier Branching Trunk](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1587/801/chandelier-trunk-png.png)

This Library is currently still a work in progress, expect many new customizable feature types to appear here in the future.

If you are a developer and wish to use EbonyLib in your own mods, then you can find Documentation and the Developer .jar [Here](https://github.com/Herobrine011840/EbonyLib). If you aren't a mod developer, then you can just download the mod and place it directly into your modpack.

     

Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/jgFEtUnc75)

 

Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates.
